title: Clean Workbench Dust
problem: Metallic dust accumulation on center workbench.
corrective_action: Install suction hood and wipe down workbench daily.
expected_benefit: Prevents dust inhalation, improves shine rating.

title: Clear blocked fire exit
problem: Wooden pallet blocks emergency egress door.
corrective_action: Relocate pallet to pallet rack and brief team on exit clearance rules.
